title: Level 2: Text Magic (Formatting)
description: Text ko bold, italic aur headings me kaise likhein.
guide:
Level 2: Text Magic

Is level me hum text ko sajana seekhenge. Jaise Word ya Google Docs me hum text ko Bold (Mota), Italic (Tircha), ya Underline karte hain, waise hi HTML me bhi kar sakte hain.

Hum 6 tarah ki Headings (h1 se h6) bhi seekhenge.
